label: USPS Informed Delivery
description: Update the name on your USPS Informed Delivery account, which provides daily email previews of incoming mail and packages.

process.summary: Log in to your USPS.com account and update your name in account settings. If you do not have an Informed Delivery account, you can skip this step — it is not a required document.

steps.description: Log in to your account at usps.com. Navigate to Account Settings and update your name fields.
If your address has also changed, submit a Change of Address form (PS Form 3575) online at usps.com or in person at your local post office.
steps.note: Name changes at the same address do not require a Change of Address form.

presence_level_content.some_guidance: This is a quick online update. It does not affect mail delivery or require any documentation.
